name: Hue To Hoi An Cycling Journey 4 Days
duration: Places:Hue - Lang Co Beach - Hoi An
highlights: Cycle through Hue's countryside to discover traditional villages, ancient architecture, and pristine beaches
Ride along scenic coastal roads with breathtaking views of lagoons and fishing villages
Conquer the iconic Hai Van Pass, known for its panoramic vistas
Explore Hoi An Ancient Town, a UNESCO World Heritage Site, or venture to My Son Sanctuary
Immerse yourself in local culture through hands-on activities in traditional craft villages

itinerary.title: Hue Countryside Exploration (Cycling: 40 km)
itinerary.description:
Distance & Est. time: Cycling 40 km

Morning

Begin your cycling journey with a scenic exploration of Hue’s countryside, immersing yourself in the rich culture and history of the region. After a hearty breakfast, enjoy a short transfer to Thanh Toan Bridge, one of Vietnam’s oldest and most unique bridges, where your cycling adventure begins. Pedal through rural pathways, surrounded by expansive rice fields, traditional homes, and vibrant gardens, offering a peaceful glimpse into local life. Continue your ride toward Dam Chuon Lagoon, part of the vast Tam Giang Lagoon system

itinerary.title: Hue - Lang Co Beach (Cycling: 50+ km)
itinerary.description:
Distance & Est. time: Cycling 50+ km

Morning

With a delicious breakfast before leaving Hue behind and heading toward the coastline. Your cycling adventure begins as you pedal along a stunning peninsular road, where you will pass through charming fishing villages and tranquil estuaries along the Perfume River. The quiet countryside roads will gradually lead you to the Phuoc Tuong Pass, a gentle hill offering sweeping panoramic views of the surrounding lagoons and the vast coastline. Afternoon

Pause for a leisurely lunch by a peaceful lagoon, where you can take in the calm, natural beauty of ...

itinerary.title: Lang Co - Hai Van Pass - Hoi An (Cycling: 70 km)
itinerary.description:
Distance & Est. time: Cycling 70 km

Today is the highlight of your cycling adventure as you take on the famous Hai Van Pass, one of Vietnam’s most renowned mountain routes. After breakfast, begin your ride along Lang Co Bay, where the views of traditional wooden fishing boats and towering mountains create a stunning backdrop. The climb up Hai Van Pass offers both a challenge and a reward, with sweeping vistas of the coastline and lush mountains. At the summit, take a moment to enjoy the panoramic views and snap some photos before descending into Da Nang, feeling the thrill of the downhill rid...

itinerary.title: Discovering Hoi An (Cycling: 30-40 km)
itinerary.description:
Distance & Est. time: Cycling 30-40 km

Option 1: My Son Sanctuary (Cycling: 40 km)
Start your day with a hearty breakfast before leaving the bustling town of Hoi An behind for a scenic ride to My Son Sanctuary, a UNESCO World Heritage site and an important cultural landmark of the Cham civilization. Cycle through the lush countryside as you approach this ancient complex, where you’ll be amazed by the intricately carved temples and towers, some of which date back to the 4th century. After exploring the sanctuary and learning about its fascinating history, hop on a transfer back to Hoi An. Spen...

included: Support vehicle to carry gear, luggage, first aid
Pick up & drop off at your hotel
All biking gear (bike, helmet, tool kit, water cage)
Water, snacks, soft drinks, and fresh fruit on cycling days
